
```{r completed ntgedsd assessments}
#| echo: false
#| eval: !expr (params$ntg_counts)
#| results: asis

atriReporter:::format_quarto(
  "Participants with Completed NTG-EDSD Assessments",
  "subsection"
)

ntgATRI <- atriReporter::get_ntgedsd(done)
ntgATRI$ids <- ntgATRI$subject_label
doneindx <- which(colnames(ntgATRI) == "done")
colnames(ntgATRI)[doneindx] <- "ntg_done"

if (!is.null(params$lonidir)) {
  ntgATRI <- params$lonidir %>%
    list.files(pattern = "NTG", full.names = TRUE) %>%
    utils::read.csv() %>%
    atriReporter::loni_join(
      atri_data = ntgATRI,
      loni_data = .,
      variables = "ntg_done"
    )
}

ntg_counts <-
  atriReporter::count_by(
    data = ntgATRI,
    id = ids,
    column = ntg_done
  )

ntg_time <- as.numeric(colnames(ntg_counts)[2:ncol(ntg_counts)])

ntg_counts_footnote <- paste(
  glue::glue("Numbers {min(ntg_time)} to {max(ntg_time)}"),
  "show how many caregivers completed at least that many NTG-EDSD Assessments."
)

ntg_counts %>%
  dplyr::mutate(variable = "Count") %>%
  dplyr::rename(`NTG-EDSD` = variable) %>%
  flextable::flextable() %>%
  atriReporter:::ft_add_abcds_theme() %>%
  flextable::add_footer_row(
    values = ntg_counts_footnote,
    colwidths = (max(ntg_time) + 1)
  ) %>%
  flextable::width(j = 1, width = 1) %>%
  flextable::width(
    j = 2:(max(ntg_time) + 1),
    width = 4 / max(ntg_time)
  )

atriReporter:::format_quarto(type = "newpage")

```
